title: OpenSoha Connector Event Batch Envelope
description: Batch wrapper posted by connector runtimes to the OpenSoha core connector event sink.

connectorId.description: Connector runtime ID that produced the batch.

events.description: Connector events normalized by the runtime.

id.description: Provider event ID when available, otherwise a deterministic idempotency key generated by the connector.

type.description: Provider event type normalized into the connector manifest event namespace, for example im.message.receive_v1.

source.description: Connector ID that produced the event.

occurredAt.description: Provider event timestamp in RFC 3339 date-time format, or runtime receipt time when the provider timestamp is unavailable.

subject.description: Optional provider resource identifier used by Soha for routing, correlation, or audit display.

payload.description: Provider-specific normalized payload. Connectors must keep secrets and raw credentials out of this object.
